segments.text: Hit Kazuya and his Rage goes wild!
segments.original_text: くらえばカズヤの堪忍袋の緒が切れる
さあレイジドライブ溜まりまして

segments.text: Kazuya enveloped in that red light!

segments.original_text: レイジドライブ当たらない

segments.text: Even if it connects, it won't KO at this percent
segments.original_text: まだねレイジドライブ当たっても撃墜しないパーセントでしょうが

segments.text: Here he reads the panic and punishes with side B!
segments.original_text: ここはレイジドライブ暴れを読み切っての横必殺技

full_text: Hit Kazuya and his Rage goes wild! There it is! Rage Drive is fully charged! Kazuya enveloped in that red light! Rage Drive whiffs! Even if it connects, it won't KO at this percent Here he reads the panic and punishes with side B! From a step back
